# JDK-8348880: Replace ConcurrentMap with AtomicReferenceArray for ZoneOffset.QUARTER_CACHE

> **PR**: [23337](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/23337) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

---

## Summary

ZoneOffset.MINUTES_15_CACHE uses AtomicReferenceArray to replace ConcurrentMap to avoid object allocation caused by boxing from int to Integer during access.
